items.name: AI system register
items.description: Maintain a documented record for each AI system.

items.name: AI use disclosure
items.description: Disclose AI use where required or appropriate.

items.name: Human review of AI outputs
items.description: Human review before high-impact use of AI outputs.

items.name: Human approval for high-risk actions
items.description: High-risk AI actions require explicit human approval.

items.name: Pre-deployment testing
items.description: Test AI behavior before production use.

items.name: Bias testing
items.description: Evaluate outputs for discriminatory patterns.

items.name: Output monitoring
items.description: Monitor outputs for drift and anomalies.

items.name: Incident logging
items.description: Log AI incidents and near-misses.

items.name: Data minimization
items.description: Use only necessary data for AI lifecycle tasks.

items.name: Data access controls
items.description: Restrict and log access to AI-relevant data.

items.name: Vendor review
items.description: Review vendor terms and AI governance posture.

items.name: Incident response plan
items.description: Maintain an AI incident response plan.

items.name: Post-incident review
items.description: Run post-incident reviews and capture lessons.

items.name: Risk assessment
items.description: Document AI risk assessment before deployment.

items.name: Agent scope definition
items.description: Define and enforce explicit agent scope boundaries.

items.name: Agent approval workflow
items.description: Require approval workflow for high-risk agent actions.

items.name: Agent activity logging
items.description: Record agent actions, tool calls, and decisions.

items.name: Access controls
items.description: Restrict AI system access to authorized roles only.

items.name: Regulatory guidance tracking
items.description: Monitor and track regulatory guidance and requirements applicable to AI systems.

items.name: Compliance update process
items.description: Maintain a documented process to incorporate new regulatory requirements and guidance into compliance posture.
